Docs.summary: GPU settings for the Agent Pool.

MemberSignature.Value: public AgentPoolGpuProfile ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolGpuDriver? Driver { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolGpuDriver> Driver
Public Property Driver As Nullable(Of AgentPoolGpuDriver)
member this.Driver : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolGpuDriver> with get, set

Docs.summary: Whether to install GPU drivers. When it's not specified, default is Install.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolGpuDriverType? DriverType { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolGpuDriverType> DriverType
Public Property DriverType As Nullable(Of AgentPoolGpuDriverType)
member this.DriverType : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolGpuDriverType> with get, set

Docs.summary: Specify the type of GPU driver to install when creating Windows agent pools. If not provided, AKS selects the driver based on system compatibility. This cannot be changed once the AgentPool has been created. This cannot be set on Linux AgentPools. For Linux AgentPools, the driver is selected based on system compatibility.
